Pricing

Simple private lesson pricing for families in the Tri-Cities. We keep our rates affordable while delivering swim instruction at the highest standard. Choose the session length that fits your swimmer best.

30 Minute Lesson

$50
  • Great for younger swimmers
  • Focused, fun, beginner-friendly sessions
  • Perfect for building comfort in the water

45 Minute Lesson

$60
  • Balanced lesson length for skill growth
  • More time for repetition and confidence
  • A popular choice for steady progress

60 Minute Lesson

✨ Best Deal
$70
  • Best for older swimmers or longer practice
  • Extra time for technique and endurance
  • Ideal for swimmers ready to level up
